title: User Guides - App Settings Menu > User Guide
scenario: User Guides section in App Settings displays split list of onboarding and user guides with back navigation and "Other devices" link to Poly support
expected: The User Guides page opens with a list of supported devices and their images. The list is split into two sections: Onboarding guides for Free 20 / Free 60 / Free 60+, and User Guides for all other devices. At the bottom, there is a "Not seeing your device?" text and an "Other devices" button that opens the Poly support web page. A back button is present in the top left corner.
